mapper.select: SELECT user_id, username, password, phone, role, avatar FROM t_user
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user(user_id,username, password, phone, role, avatar) VALUES(#{userId},#{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, 'user', 'images/avatar.png')
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM t_user WHERE user_id LIKE '2026%' ORDER BY user_id DESC LIMIT 1
